channel.title: Yasik on paper.archive
channel.description: Recent content in Yasik on paper.archive

item.title: Yasik — Sea Snail Salad & Blanched Squid, Delivered
item.description:
Late-night eating is practically a national sport in Korea — it even has its own word, yasik (야식). Tonight’s yasik came by delivery app.

Sora-muchim (소라무침) — sea snail tossed with minari and perilla leaves in a sweet-tangy gochujang dressing. Chewy, spicy, bright. I boiled a batch of somyeon (소면, thin wheat noodles) myself to go with it: mixing the noodles into the leftover dressing is honestly the main event.
